title: 有馬記念の後に・アタシは強い

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
At the year-end Grand Prix—the Arima
Kinen—standing at the top of all these amazing
classic and senior racers is...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin! She's seized victory with her
unprecedentedly powerful final sprint!

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Dear... Look at how strong you are. Look how
strong you've become!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket hoists Narita Taishin atop her
shoulders—with Biwa Hayahide lending a steady
hand on her back to keep her from falling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her head held higher than anyone else's,
Narita Taishin basks in the thunderous applause
and booming cheers that never seem to end.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: You were the fastest of them all!
